2004-06-02‚ÄéI seriously dont understand! I seriously do not understand this whole relationship thing! I mean... somewhere along the way i must have missed a clue! I must have skipped a sign....cause seriously i have no idea about what a relationship is consist of!!!  If u like a guy and u really want it to work out.... be almost sure that IT WONT happen!! And if u dont really care bout it
column2: be positive that he'll come around!! well... i just figured since im so bad at figuring things out that i would just not try at all!! Thats were i got it all wrong!! Things seem to be even more complicated once u have no intention to make it a big deal! I was trying to take life not as serious... i was just trying to have fun! It seems that i was lookin for fun in the wrong place!!  I thought u were lookin for the samething as me... apparently not! Why did u have to expect sooooo much from me? im sorry but as i said... i was just trying to enjoy life! Im sorry if i didnt feel the samething as u did but as i told u... dont expect much from me!!!
